primary_sources.title: Musyawarah Nasional forum transcript, 10 May 2026, DPM Zahid Hamidi keynote
Centre for Independent Journalism (CIJ) Sedition Act case tracker, 2025 figures

reach_estimate.estimate_basis: Musyawarah Nasional in-person attendance plus televised and online coverage

notes: DPM Zahid called for 'firm, fair, wise' action against insults to Islam and Malay Rulers and a strengthened legal framework. The speech is a position-marking event: it asserts UMNO leadership on the 3R-defense frame at a moment when PAS-led PN has historically held that ground. Context: Sedition Act cases rose to 36 in 2025 from 19; CMA s.233 already raised 10× to RM500,000 in February 2025. The speech does not propose specific new legislation — it stakes a brand position. The 16 May 2026 Daulat Tuanku rally (T4A issue 1999) follows the same week.
